findings.title: Access cookie loses httpOnly
findings.evidence: accessCookie changes from { httpOnly: true } to an empty object, allowing scripts to read the cookie.

findings.title: Refresh cookie loses secure flag
findings.evidence: refreshCookie changes from { secure: true } to an empty object, allowing the cookie to be sent over plain HTTP.

findings.title: CSRF cookie sameSite downgraded
findings.evidence: csrfCookie changes sameSite from "Strict" to "None", weakening CSRF protection.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v3. Blind subagent: packet-only context; severity-scored prompt.
